task_completion.description: Open the Sentinel-2 RGB imagery in the GIS software.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file 'sentinel2_b432.tif' from '/home/ga/snap_data/' is visible in the software's layer manager, product tree, or file explorer.

task_completion.description: Reproject the imagery into a projected coordinate system with metric units.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A reprojection tool or dialog is open showing a target CRS that is a projected coordinate system (e.g., UTM, Web Mercator) with metric units, or a new reprojected product is visible in the product tree.

task_completion.description: Create a spatial subset of a region of interest within the scene.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A subset/clip/crop dialog is open showing bounding box coordinates or pixel dimensions being adjusted, or a new subsetted product appears in the product tree.

task_completion.description: Save the processed product in BEAM-DIMAP format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save Product' or 'Export' dialog showing the format selected as BEAM-DIMAP (.dim), or a file manager showing a .dim file and corresponding .data folder being created.

task_completion.description: Export the final map-ready GeoTIFF to the specified exports directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog showing the format as GeoTIFF and the destination path as '/home/ga/snap_exports/', or a file manager showing the newly created .tif file in that directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the GIS software GUI (e.g., ESA SNAP or QGIS) rather than bypassing the UI with terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the GIS software interface open with the image loaded and tools being used, not just a terminal window executing GDAL or Python scripts.

integrity.description: The agent actually performed the reprojection and subsetting operations using the software's tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: Dialog boxes for Reprojection and Spatial Subset are visible with parameters being actively configured.

integrity.description: The agent used the software to export the files rather than manually creating empty files or renaming extensions.
integrity.visual_evidence: The exported files (BEAM-DIMAP and GeoTIFF) are shown being generated by the software's progress bar or explicitly saved via the software's native save/export dialogs.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The input file is located at /home/ga/snap_data/sentinel2_b432.tif and contains Sentinel-2 B4, B3, B2 bands (RGB). The task requires saving an intermediate or final product in BEAM-DIMAP format (which typically creates a .dim file and a .data folder) and exporting a final GeoTIFF (.tif) to the /home/ga/snap_exports/ directory.
